query: Which papers in my library failed ingest because the PDF needs OCR, page-image inspection, or a cleaner replacement source? I want cleanup targets and source-quality holds, not scientific evidence.
expected_context_properties: Context should retrieve source-quality holds as cleanup work rather than prior-work evidence.
Context should expose managed source path, extraction reasons, OCR/replacement next steps, and source-quality review state.
Normal scientific paper pages may appear only as lower-ranked lexical neighbors, not as reliable evidence targets.
must_not_do: Do not treat source-quality holds as scientific claims.
Do not hide the OCR/replacement repair action.
